stories.headline: EU Leaders Debate Ambitious 2040 Climate Targets Amid Economic Concerns
stories.summary: European Union leaders are meeting to finalize new, stricter climate goals for 2040, facing resistance from some nations concerned about economic impact. This will shape Europe's green transition.

stories.headline: UN Panel Proposes Global Framework for AI Governance and Ethics
stories.summary: A UN expert panel unveiled a draft global framework for AI regulation, aiming to ensure ethical development and prevent misuse. This could standardize international AI policy.

stories.headline: New Asia-Pacific Trade Pact Boosts Regional Economic Outlook
stories.summary: Several Asia-Pacific nations ratified a new comprehensive trade agreement, expected to significantly boost regional trade and investment. This could counter global economic slowdowns.

stories.headline: Malaria Vaccine Rollout Accelerates Across Sub-Saharan Africa
stories.summary: A major international initiative announced accelerated distribution of a highly effective malaria vaccine, reaching millions more children. This is a critical step against a deadly disease.

stories.headline: Powerful Earthquake Strikes Central American Pacific Coast
stories.summary: A magnitude 7.5 earthquake struck off the coast of Central America, prompting tsunami warnings and causing significant infrastructure damage. Rescue efforts are underway.
